zh.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint M: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Moulton於大約1508年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Robert Moulton35歲，母親Margaret Watts32歲。他於大約1554年與Joan Green結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1573年6月22日之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint M: 英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh-hans.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Moulton于大约1508年出生在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲Robert Moulton35岁，母亲Margaret Watts32岁。他于大约1554年与Joan Green结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1573年6月22日之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Moulton was born about 1508, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Moulton, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Watts, was 32. He married Joan Green about 1554. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after 22 June 1573, in his hometown, and was buried in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Joan Green environ 1554. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 22 juin 1573, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Moultonが約1508年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父Robert Moultonは35歳，母Margaret Wattsは32歳であった。約1554年にJoan Greenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1573年6月22日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint M: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: John Moulton(이)가 대략 1508년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Moulton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Watts(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1554년 Joan Green(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1573년 6월 22일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

ru.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint M: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Moulton родился около 1508 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Moulton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Watts, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Green около 1554 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после 22 июнь 1573 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
